creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Port was marked broken, as distfiles were un-fetchable.
This PR corrects this problem by adding reliable
MASTER_SITES, and requests an update to MAINTAINER.

A patch will follow shortly, as a reply to this pr(1).

Fix: 

A patch will follow shortly as a reply to this PR.
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to build this port.
